method.type: QMIX with hypernetwork-based monotonic mixing (Rashid et al. 2018)
method.implementation: EPyMARL-faithful: hypernetwork weights, abs() monotonicity, epsilon-greedy

comparison_with_custom.note: Custom and canonical QMIX produce qualitatively identical results: Nash Trap convergence

key_finding: Canonical QMIX (λ=0.504, surv=68.6%) confirms Nash Trap
